“Why didn’t anyone tell me this before?”

MORE WHY

ASK WHY

powered by DiagnoseThis.com

Your question:

I’ve been living with Lyme and my stomach hurts. My doctor says it’s just anxiety, but I notice it happens 30 minutes after I eat. By the end of the day I’m so bloated my pants don’t fit. What could be going on?

Top 3 Ideas

Possible patterns behind what you are feeling

1

Gut-Inflammation Connection

When the gut is irritated or out of balance, it can trigger inflammation that spreads through the body even to the hips and joints.

2

Thyroid and Metabolic Slowdown

A sluggish thyroid or slower metabolism can cause fatigue, stiffness, and poor tissue repair, even if standard thyroid labs look normal.

3

Nutrient Deficiency Loop

Low iron, vitamin D, or B12 can limit oxygen delivery, energy, and muscle recovery keeping pain from fully healing.
